{{CargoRelic
|name=Rainbow Feathered Robe
|class_id=21039
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Tang Emperor’s dream-inspired fusion of Brahman melodies and Chinese motifs. Surviving fragments in Dunhuang manuscripts hint at its lost grandeur.
|fame=106
|art=56
|fth=49
|civ=74
|tech=77
|ss1=Snail Leadership +3<br>Zombie Minion ATK +3%<br>Per Zombie Form Tier, Snail ATK +15<br>Zombie Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Zombie Minion ATK +4%<br>Per Zombie Form Tier, Snail ATK +20<br>Zombie Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss3=Snail Leadership +5<br>Zombie Minion ATK +5%<br>Per Zombie Form Tier, Snail ATK +25<br>Zombie Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss4=Snail Leadership +7<br>Zombie Minion ATK +7%<br>Per Zombie Form Tier, Snail ATK +35<br>Zombie Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss5=Snail Leadership +9<br>Zombie Minion ATK +9%<br>Per Zombie Form Tier, Snail ATK +45<br>Zombie Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss6=Snail Leadership +12<br>Zombie Minion ATK +12%<br>Per Zombie Form Tier, Snail ATK +60<br>Zombie Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss7=Snail Leadership +12<br>Zombie Minion ATK +12%<br>Per Zombie Form Tier, Snail ATK +60<br>Zombie Form Tiers: 9/9<br>Snail Leadership +5 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Kemet skill III.png|50px]]Place in Kemetic Museum: Medal Output +30
|skill2=[[File:Kemet skill III.png|50px]]Place in Kemetic Museum: This Relic's FAME +15
|skill3=[[File:Kemet skill III.png|50px]]Place in Kemetic Museum: In Kemet, 2x Orange Reagent Drops +15%
}}
